# PICO — sources

- Server API auth:
  https://developer.picoxr.com/reference/unity-server/latest/authentication-method/
- Verify ownership:
  https://developer.picoxr.com/reference/unity-server/latest/verify-item-ownership/
- Purchases list:
  https://developer.picoxr.com/reference/unity-server/latest/gets-a-list-of-purchased-items/
- Error codes:
  https://developer.picoxr.com/reference/unity-server/latest/error-codes/
- Settlement (email/dashboard only):
  https://developer.picoxr.com/document/distribute/automatic-settlement-and-payment/

No machine-readable spec. The docs render client-side, so the example blocks only show up
in the page's embedded JSON, not to a plain scraper.
